title: SiTime Q4 2020 Earnings Call Transcript - Record Revenue Growth
text: SiTime reported Q4 2020 with record revenue of $40.3 million, which was above their updated guidance provided on November 24. This revenue represented an increase of 23% sequentially and 43% year-over-year driven by broad-based growth across all three of their end markets. For the full-year 2020, total revenue grew by 38% over 2019. Non-GAAP gross margins were expected to be between 52% and 53%, up more than 5 points over the same quarter last year. The earnings call for Q4 2020 took place on February 3, 2021, where these strong results were discussed.
